tools.name: gh
tools.description: GitHub CLI for issue, pull request, and repository workflows.

GH_TOKEN.description: GitHub token supplied by the host environment.

tools.name: cargo
tools.description: Rust package manager and build tool.

tools.name: kubectl
tools.description: Kubernetes command-line client. Host cluster config must already be handled outside this tool-only scope.

TF_TOKEN_app_terraform_io.description: Optional Terraform Cloud token supplied by host environment.

tools.name: aws
tools.description: AWS CLI. Host credentials must be supplied through env or other configured secret sources.

AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: AWS access key ID supplied by host environment.

AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: AWS secret access key supplied by host environment.

AWS_SESSION_TOKEN.description: Optional temporary AWS session token supplied by host environment.
